headline: Tracking Bill Ackman's Pershing Square 13F Portfolio - Q4 2025 Update
summary: Pershing Square's Q4 2025 13F portfolio rose to ~$15.53B, with top holdings in Brookfield, Uber, and Amazon comprising ~59%. Read more on the portfolio here.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $303
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Hilton Worldwide Holdings (NYSE:HLT) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $306 to $303.

raw.headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $303

headline: Hilton Introduces the Hilton AI Planner, Advancing the Future of Curated Travel Discovery
summary: MCLEAN, Va., March 10, 2026--Hilton today announced its new Hilton AI Planner, a generative AI–powered digital concierge that helps travelers explore the company’s global portfolio of hotels and plan memorable stays with Hilton. The introduction of the Hilton AI Planner, now in beta testing at hilton.com, addresses the growing use of AI tools for travel planning and underscores Hilton’s long-standing commitment to innovation and investment in technologies that enhance the guest experience.
